In January 2024, an international energy agency (IEA) published a report predicting the world's use of power.
According to the report, the demand for power for these uses has doubled by 2026, and its use may be equal to Japan's total power use.

The massive use of power by AI is the cause of increased use of fossil fuels, may delay the closing of old nuclear plants, and is concerned about the emissions of greenhouse gases and the promoting of global warming.
